arts.ttl: Club Brugge youngster departs Belgium to join up with Norwegian side SK Brann
arts.sum: Club Brugge have confirmed that young defender Denzel De Roeve has left the club after over nine seasons. De Roeve will join up with Norwegian side SK Brann, who finished…

arts.ttl: Club Brugge scouting report: How good are Aston Villa's Champions League Last 16 opponents?
arts.sum: Although Aston Villa’s form in the Premier League this season has been anything but consistent, Unai Emery’s side have done remarkably well in the Champions League. Not only did the...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa handed major injury boosts ahead of Club Brugge clash
arts.sum: Aston Villa will pay both legs of their Champions League round of 16 tie against Club Brugge either side of facing Brentford away before the March international break Aston Villa handed major injury boosts ahead of Club Brugge clash

arts.ttl: What Club Brugge manager said about Aston Villa and Marcus Rashford didn't shock me
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford, Marco Asensio and Axel Disasi could all feature in the Champions League for the first time as Aston Villa's players on Tuesday “It doesn’t change the quality in their team (when players play in different positions).”

arts.ttl: FA Cup quarter-finals: Bournemouth to face Man City, Preston to host Villa
arts.sum: In-form Bournemouth are drawn at home to Manchester City in the FA Cup quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Club Brugge suffer big injury blow before Aston Villa clash in the Champions League
arts.sum: Club Brugge manager Nicky Hayen has confirmed Joaquin Seys will miss their Champions League round of 16 first leg clash against Aston Villa through injury. Club Brugge suffer big injury blow before Aston Villa clash in the Champions League

arts.ttl: How much Aston Villa can earn from beating Club Brugge after £75m boost revealed
arts.sum: Aston Villa will look to take a lead back to Birmingham next week when they face Club Brugge in the first leg of their Champions League round of 16 clash on Tuesday night. Club Brugge host Aston Villa for the first leg of the Champions League round of 16 tie at the Jan Breydel Stadium on Tuesday (5:45pm)

arts.ttl: Micah Richards makes 'big clubs' comment as he assesses Aston Villa FA Cup chance
arts.sum: It leaves only Manchester City, who were beaten finalists last year, still in the competition, while Villa - who take on the remaining Championship team in Preston North End in the quarters - will fancy their chances of progressing further and going on to lift the trophy at the Wembley showpiece in May. Former Aston Villa defender Micah Richards sees an opportunity for a Premier League side outside of the traditional 'Big Six' to lift the FA Cup this year after a flurry of high profile exits in the most recent rounds of the competition.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa linked with exciting transfer for midfielder compared to N'Golo Kante
arts.sum: Camara, 21, is a Senegalese international who already has 23 caps and six goals for his country, only signed for Monaco from French counterparts Metz for £12.5m on a five-year contract last summer; despite being in a relegation battle with Metz and having to make the step up to a side in the Champions League, he has done so impressively. While Emery's pool of options remains healthy - John McGinn, Youri Tielemans, Boubacar Kamara and Jacob Ramsey being available have helped to cover the losses to injury of Onana and Barkley - a reassessing of the club's midfield department once this season ends is likely to take place.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set to reap the rewards of Unai Emery's summer transfer u-turn
arts.sum: Indeed it was claimed in the summer that Villa boss Unai Emery had to think twice about the prospect of loaning Barrenechea out; he was initially refused the option to join Valencia on loan, but having expressed a desire to explore the opportunity to play his football this season elsewhere, Emery eventually permitted the midfielder to do so. Barrenechea, who joined Villa from Juventus before being loaned out to Valencia, has been an important cog in their side this year; of those 24 points earned thus far, only a single point has been claimed in Barrenechea's absence.
